title: Evil Seagull
description: The seagulls in Alex's Mob mod can steal food from your ME Interface block and  SophisticatedBackpacks.
body:
# Evil Seagull - Making Seagulls "Smarter"

  Tired of Alex's Mobs seagulls only stealing food from your hands? Now they've learned some advanced tricks!

  What Does This Mod Do?

  Evil Seagull makes seagulls smarter (and more mischievous). They can now:

  🎒 Steal from Your Backpacks - Your inventory isn't safe anymore! Seagulls will snatch items from Sophisticated Backpacks you're carrying

  🏠 Raid Placed Backpacks - Even backpacks placed in the world aren't safe from their claws

  ⚡ Hack Your ME System - They can steal from AE2 ME Interfaces, consuming your network power in the process

  🔌 Infiltrate RS Networks - Refined Storage Interfaces are also vulnerable to these crafty birds

  ⚙️ Snatch from Conveyor Belts - Create mod belts? Seagulls will hover above and grab items right off them!

  🥔 Special Achievement - When a seagull steals a baked potato, nearby players unlock a special advancement

  New in 1.4.0

  - Create Mod Support - Seagulls now target items on Create conveyor belts with unique hovering behavior
  - Refined Storage Support - RS Interfaces are now valid theft targets
  - Steal Any Item Mode - Optional config to let seagulls steal non-food items too
  - Smart Item Handling - When stealing non-food items, seagulls fly away and drop them at a random location instead of eating them
  - Expanded Search Range - Default search range increased to 16 blocks (matching vanilla seagull item detection)
  - Optimized Performance - Improved chunk-based block entity search algorithm

  Why Use This Mod?

  - Enhanced Gameplay - Seagulls are no longer just decorative, they're creatures you need to watch out for
  - Perfect Integration - Designed to work seamlessly with Sophisticated Backpacks, Applied Energistics 2, Refined Storage, and Create
  - Highly Customizable - Every feature can be adjusted or disabled through config files
  - Balanced - Seagulls have cooldowns between thefts, so your items won't vanish instantly

  Main Features

  Intelligent Target Detection

  Seagulls will search up to 16 blocks for:

  - Sophisticated Backpacks in player inventories
  - Sophisticated Backpack blocks placed in the world
  - Applied Energistics 2 ME Interfaces
  - Refined Storage Interfaces
  - Create mod Conveyor Belts with items

  They'll choose the closest valid target to "attack".

  Theft Behavior

  For Food Items:
  1. Seagull flies toward the target
  2. Pecks when close, stealing food
  3. Quickly flees with the loot
  4. Eventually eats the stolen food
  5. Enters cooldown period before attempting another theft

  For Non-Food Items (when enabled):
  1. Seagull steals the item
  2. Flies to a random location (5-15 blocks away)
  3. Drops the item on the ground
  4. Enters cooldown period

  Special Belt Behavior:
  - Seagulls hover in circles above conveyor belts before swooping down to grab items

  Power/Energy Consumption

  When stealing from tech mod interfaces:
  - ME Interfaces: Consumes ME network power (default 10 AE per theft)
  - RS Interfaces: Consumes RS network energy (default 10 FE per theft)

  If the network lacks power, seagulls can't steal from it.

  Configuration Options

  Everything is customizable! Config file located at config/evilseagull-common.toml:

  Sophisticated Backpacks

  - Toggle theft from carried/placed backpacks
  - Adjust search ranges (1-32/50 blocks)
  - Enable stealing any item (not just food)

  Applied Energistics 2

  - Toggle ME Interface theft
  - Adjust search range and power cost
  - Enable stealing any item

  Refined Storage

  - Toggle RS Interface theft
  - Adjust search range and energy cost
  - Enable stealing any item

  Create

  - Toggle belt theft
  - Adjust search range
  - Configure hover time (min/max)
  - Configure drop range for non-food items
  - Steal any item enabled by default

  General

  - Theft cooldown modifier (50%-500%)
  - Prioritize player main inventory
  - Drop range for non-food items

  Dependencies & Compatibility

  Required Mods:
  - Alex's Mobs (provides seagull entity)

  Optional Mods:
  - Sophisticated Backpacks (enables backpack theft features)
  - Applied Energistics 2 (enables ME Interface theft features)
  - Refined Storage (enables RS Interface theft features)
  - Create (enables conveyor belt theft features)

  If optional mods aren't installed, corresponding features automatically disable without causing crashes.

  Technical Implementation

  - Uses Mixin technology to extend seagull AI
  - Fully compatible with Alex's Mobs theft blacklist
  - Smart mod detection with lazy loading
  - Optimized chunk-based search for better performance
  - Proper cooldown system prevents spam stealing

  Perfect For

  - Alex's Mobs fans
  - Players using storage/automation mods
  - Players wanting more gameplay challenge
  - Modpack creators (difficulty adjustable via config)

  Important Notes

  - By default, seagulls only steal food items (configurable per mod)
  - Respects Alex's Mobs theft blacklist settings
  - Reasonable cooldowns prevent theft spam (75-150 seconds base)
  - Any feature can be disabled at any time through config

  ---
  Make your Minecraft world more lively! Seagulls are no longer docile seabirds, but crafty thieves you need to watch out for!

  Version: 1.4.0 | Minecraft 1.20.1 | Forge 47.3.10+
